events.text: Goal!  Switzerland 0, France 1. Olivier Giroud (France) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Mathieu Valbuena with a cross   following a corner.
Goal!  Switzerland 0, France 2. Blaise Matuidi (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Karim Benzema with a through ball.
Penalty saved. Karim Benzema (France)  right footed shot saved  in the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Switzerland 0, France 3. Mathieu Valbuena (France) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Olivier Giroud   following a fast break.
Goal!  Switzerland 0, France 4. Karim Benzema (France) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Paul Pogba with a through ball.
Goal!  Switzerland 0, France 5. Moussa Sissoko (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Karim Benzema.
Goal!  Switzerland 1, France 5. Blerim Dzemaili (Switzerland) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Switzerland 2, France 5. Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Gökhan Inler with a through ball.
Yohan Cabaye (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

venue.name: Casa de Apostas Arena Fonte Nova
